description: Tests CSRF expiry detection - when server returns csrf_expired, client handles the error gracefully

browserSteps.value: Monkey-patch fetch to return csrf_expired on first action call

const originalFetch = window.fetch; let callCount = 0; window.fetch = function(...args) { callCount++; document.getElementById('intercept-count').textContent = String(callCount); document.getElementById('intercept-count').style.display = 'block'; if (callCount === 1 && String(args[0]).includes('/_piko/actions/')) { return Promise.resolve(new Response(JSON.stringify({ status: 403, error: 'csrf_expired', message: 'CSRF token expired' }), { status: 403, headers: {'Content-Type':'application/json'} })); } return originalFetch.apply(this, args); };
Click action button - first call will get csrf_expired
Verify the intercepted call was made
const count = document.getElementById('intercept-count'); if (count && parseInt(count.textContent || '0') === 0) { count.textContent = 'no-calls'; count.style.display = 'block'; }
